name: Fudgy Bonbons
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sweetened condensed milk (14 ounces; not evaporated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a heat-safe bowl, melt chocolate chips and butter together over low heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in condensed milk until smooth.
4. Stir in flour, vanilla, and chopped nuts (if using) until combined.
5. Line an ungreased baking sheet with parchment paper.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared sheet, shaping into small balls about 1 inch in diameter.
7. Replace melted chocolate candy kisses or white chocolate-striped candy kisses on top of each ball to resemble eyes and a mouth.
8. Place the baking sheet in the oven and bake for 20-25 minutes or until the bonbons are firm but fudgy.
9. Turn off the oven when finished baking.
10. Allow the bonbons to cool completely before removing from the parchment paper and serving.
